mechanics.excerpt: Miscellaneous Though the following items are technically explosives they each contain some small pyrotechnic charge_ they do not fit into any standard category: Emergency Flares: Designed to simply burn, not explode flares can mark position start fire_ Each will burn for 30 minutes. Because they contain their own oxygen supply: flares will burn heavy rainfall and even underwater. 138
